states.name: Slizzle
states.title: Slizzle
states.description: Slizzles slurm through the slippery slog of slathering slop of the Caves of Reia. Despite their animalistic appearance, they're rather intelligent, and have been found slurping and slathering little messages to one another. They also apparently communicate by intentionally manipulating their strange star patterns.

states.name: Slazzle
states.title: Slazzle
states.description: Slazzles slip and slide through the slime and slick of the Caves of Reia. It's said that if one follows the star charts that surround their bodies, it'll lead to a great treasure. This is an odd rumor, since the stars move rapidly and don't seem to correspond to Erden's cosmology.
